title: zanthoxylum dissitum var. hispidum
intro: Zanthoxylum dissitum var. hispidum, also known as Hispid Korean prickly ash, is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Hispid Korean prickly ash include relieving pain and reducing inflammation, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and antiviral properties. Hispid Korean prickly ash can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and may also be used as a tincture or in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
